arts.ttl: Tottenham could do worse than complete six-year transfer mission to sign forgotten Chelsea man - Lee Wilmot
arts.sum: But Spurs could do worse than look to a player they were linked with signing six years ago to help with their injury crisis at the other end of the field. Ben Chilwell was heavily linked with Spurs in 2018 before signing a new deal to stay at Leicester City.

arts.ttl: In search of the origins to the toxic Tottenham-Chelsea rivalry featuring meat hooks at White Hart Lane, electrified fencing at Stamford Bridge and some football in between
arts.sum: KIERAN GILL: In search of its origins, before there was even a flicker of a feud, Mail Sport was told to look back to the 1967 FA Cup final - or the 'Cockney Cup final' as it was christened.

arts.ttl: Team News: Tottenham Hotspur vs. Chelsea injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Sunday's Premier League clash between Tottenham Hotspur and Chelsea.

arts.ttl: ‘I’d been told’: £22m Tottenham player was asked to mentor Archie Gray this season – journalist
arts.sum: Tottenham made a point of signing a number of young players in the summer. Tottenham spent big money bolstering their squad with fresh young talent,...

arts.ttl: Chelsea predicted lineup vs Tottenham - Premier League
arts.sum: How Chelsea could line up for their London derby with Tottenham in the Premier League on Sunday.

According to TBR Football, Fernandes has attracted the attention of several Premier League sides, including the likes of Arsenal, Chelsea and Liverpool . It is asserted that Liverpool are looking at Fernandes as a potential long-term replacement for Trent Alexander-Arnold, while Arsenal and Chelsea are simply attracted by his evident potential.

arts.ttl: 'Strong' Chelsea player is now 'very likely' to leave the club in January - Fabrizio Romano
arts.sum: Chelsea’s first-team midfielder is being strongly tipped with a transfer move in January. Blues head coach Enzo Maresca is extremely fortunate to be working with...

arts.ttl: Chelsea Predicted Lineup vs. Tottenham Hotspur: Premier League
arts.sum: Chelsea visits Tottenham hoping to continue its strong form in the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou could lose another Tottenham ace with triple suspension risk in nightmare period
arts.sum: Bissouma is now on four yellow cards in the Premier League for the season, meaning he is one away from receiving a one-match ban. As ever, players who receive a total of five yellow cards in their first 19 fixtures will be given a one-match suspension.

arts.ttl: Man Utd 'plot' shock Son Heung-min transfer as Ange Postecoglou dealt major Tottenham blow
arts.sum: The 32-year-old forward faces an increasingly uncertain future in North London, with his contract set to expire at the end of the season . In September, Son revealed that he hadn't yet held talks with Tottenham over a new deal, insisting he remained focused on possibly his final season in North London.
